title: Pacaltsdorp business association's charity gala a big success
bodyText:
BUSINESS NEWS - The Pacaltsdorp Community Business Association's (PCBA) annual charity gala at the Pacaltsdorp Community Hall on Saturday 4 October was a huge success.


> The guests enjoyed a glamourous evening with good food and fun.


The funds raised during the event are to provide bursaries for further studies for some of the top matriculants of Pacaltsdorp High.

Every year at the gala event, the PCBA shines the spotlight on people working behind the scenes in the community by handing out certificates of recognition.

This year, recognition was given to Aldo Meyer, Franciska Gentle da Silva, Melonique Morris, Ebrahim America, Fernando Antonio Fredericks, Beverley McKelly, the Pacaltsdorp Community Men's Group, Megan Cunningham, Angelique Vezasie and Veronique Nicky Harmse Ferndale.

Lu-Kayden Oliver, Betram Jordaan, Esme Jordaan, Letitia Ahrendse, Rita Gregory, Luwayda Trantaal, Nolita Wilson, Reginald Wilson and Myron Gregory.

Some of the guests who enjoyed the evening: Anesthesia Jansen and Trudie Jansen and Gabby van Lill.

Veronica Bantom, Beauty Makaloi, Bernadette Petersen and Nolutando Jack.

Charlotte Edwards and Bernadette Petersen.

Luwayda Trantaal, chairperson of the PCBA, and Adv Marilyn Scheepers.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
